title: Minty Mango Paneer Breakfast Parfait
description: A refreshing breakfast parfait with the sweetness of mango and the coolness of mint, paired with the creaminess of paneer.
instructions: In a bowl, mix together the crumbled paneer and diced mango.
Add the minty sauce to the paneer and mango mixture and stir well.
If using spicy chutney, add it on top of the mixture for an extra kick.
Layer the mixture in a glass or a bowl to create a parfait.
Chill in the refrigerator for at least 15 minutes before serving.
